name: bb_rsi_mean_reversion_us500_m5
hypothesis: US500 (equity index) is more mean-reverting intraday than XAU due to liquidity provision behavior and VWAP anchoring; BB(20,1.75) + RSI(7) extremes filtered by BB-width percentile and low-ADX regime produce a positive-expectancy scalp. This replaces the failed XAU M15 mean-reversion (dead branch) with a symbol better suited to the family.

regime_filter.skip_when: adx >= 22 OR bb_width_pct <= 30 OR outside session OR atr extremes

exits.tp: opposite bollinger band (mean reversion target) OR middle BB if adverse rsi cross
